title: When using aggregate SQL functions, precision & decimal metadata for numeric/decimal type returned is 0,0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE type_test (id UInt64, dval Decimal(10,5), nval Decimal(10,5));
SELECT COUNT(dval) AS count_dval, COUNT(nval) AS count_nval FROM type_test;
SELECT SUM(dval) AS sum_dval, SUM(nval) AS sum_nval FROM type_test;
SELECT AVG(dval) AS avg_dval, AVG(nval) AS avg_nval FROM type_test WHERE dval IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Aggregate SQL functions return incorrect precision for decimals
